SourceProxy.label: SHYX Adaptive Isotropic Remesher
SourceProxy.name: SHYXAdaptiveIsotropicRemesher

Documentation.short_help: Curvature-aware CGAL remesh with min/max edge length.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Adaptive isotropic remeshing using CGAL Adaptive_sizing_field (discrete curvature). Edge lengths are limited by Min/Max Edge Length; AdaptiveTolerance controls fineness together with curvature. With a Selection (or Selection Cell Array Name), only those faces are remeshed; otherwise the whole surface is remeshed. Optional post-remesh smooth_shape uses the same Protection Angle to detect sharp edges and fix those vertices. Port 1 outputs detected sharp features on the final mesh (VTK_LINE + VTK_VERTEX). Requires CGAL 6.0+.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Optional vtkSelection (active selection). When present and non-empty, CGAL remeshing is applied only to the indicated faces (same convention as SHYX Delete Selected Cells).

StringVectorProperty.name: SelectionCellArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Selection Cell Array Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: If Selection is empty: name of a cell data array on Input. Faces are remeshed when value > 0.5 (float) or non-zero (integer types).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MinEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Min Edge Length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum edge length; must be > 0. ParaView BoundsDomain (scaled_extent 0.001) suggests 0.1% of the input axis-aligned bounding box longest side; use scale/Reset next to the property.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max Edge Length

DoubleVectorProperty.name: AdaptiveTolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Adaptive Tolerance (tol)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL adaptive sizing tolerance; smaller values tend to refine more within min/max bounds.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfRelaxationSteps
IntVectorProperty.label: Relaxation Steps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL vertex relocation steps per remesh iteration (higher = smoother surface; 0 = no relaxation).

IntVectorProperty.name: ShapeSmoothingIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Shape Smooth Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Post-remesh CGAL smooth_shape iterations. 0 disables. Sharp-edge vertices (Protection Angle) stay fixed.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ShapeSmoothingTimeStep
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Shape Smooth Time Step
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL smooth_shape time step (smoothing speed). Typical range about 1e-6 to 1. Used only when Shape Smooth Iterations > 0.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ProtectAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Protection Angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Feature edge angle threshold in degrees.

IntVectorProperty.name: SharpFeatureSideFilter
IntVectorProperty.label: Sharp side filter
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Optional filter on interior sharp edges after CGAL detect_sharp_edges, using signed dihedral angle (approximate_dihedral_angle). Excludes concave (signed < 0) or convex (signed > 0) from remesh/shape constraints and from port 1. Boundary edges unchanged. If convex/concave looks swapped, flip mesh orientation or pick the other entry.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, point/cell data are interpolated onto the new mesh.
